title: Cheesemon
description: A midweight modpack featuring Create and Cobblemon. Nothing over the top, with a ton of performance focused mods.
body:
# A midweight modpack featuring _Create_ and _Cobblemon_ - the Industrial Revolution meets Pokemon. ![cheesemon terrain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1cf72ae296055508918d95eaac11a478f9f6e2c_0.webp) _Nothing over the top, with a ton of performance focused mods._
This modpack is in the early testing phase and is made for a community server. # Mods - Create - _Aesthetic automation_ - Cobblemon - _The Pokemon mod we all know and love_ - Terralith + Tectonic - _Sprawling mountain ranges and large variety of vanilla+ biomes_ - Multiplayer Focus - _Simple Voice Chat, multiplayer performance focused_ - Fabric Seasons - _Feel the passage of time as your world changes throughout the seasons_ - Horror - _Some light/harmless horror elements, are we meant to combine these two worlds?_ - Yung's Better - _Explore vast dungeons and massive temples in a vanilla+ theme_ This is not a kitchen sink modpack, but the mod list is long. There are a ton of QoL and performance mods so that you can get the most out of your world/server. # Performance This modpack is full of optimization features and performance improvements. However, it is designed mainly for multiplayer, with the intention of the server doing most of the heavy lifting. # _All credit goes to the mod developers._
